'''âp-ng-d-ng''' ('''kapangdengoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:photolyse|photolyse]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-ng-d-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:photolyse|photolyse]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-ng-d-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kapangdengoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipangdengoko|thipangdengoko]] || [[word:jipangdengoko|jipangdengoko]] || [[word:shipangdengoko|shipangdengoko]] || [[word:kipangdengoko|kipangdengoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupangdengoko|thuthupangdengoko]] || [[word:jujupangdengoko|jujupangdengoko]] || [[word:shushupangdengoko|shushupangdengoko]] || [[word:kukupangdengoko|kukupangdengoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopangdengoko|thopangdengoko]] || [[word:jopangdengoko|jopangdengoko]] || [[word:shopangdengoko|shopangdengoko]] || [[word:kopangdengoko|kopangdengoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠpangdengoko|thĂŠpangdengoko]] || [[word:jĂŠpangdengoko|jĂŠpangdengoko]] || [[word:shĂŠpangdengoko|shĂŠpangdengoko]] || [[word:kĂŠpangdengoko|kĂŠpangdengoko]]
|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
